channel.title: mdevtech Blogs
channel.description: Practical AI tools and workflows for students, freelancers, and small local businesses.

item.title: AI Productivity Tools for Students: Practical Workflow
item.description: Learn a practical AI productivity tools for students workflow with tools, prompt templates, verification checks, and common mistakes to avoid before you reuse it.
